examples: I read newspaper, is wearing a Presbyopia mirror.

Would you tell me whether your father has myopia or presbyopia?
First, long-sightedness (presbyopia) is almost unknown at 35, yet is universal by 50.
People who work in jobs which require them to do a great deal of reading are likely to suffer from the condition, known as presbyopia, and will need glasses earlier.
